script:
set -e
printf 'cwd: '; pwd
printf 'user: '; whoami
printf 'git: '; git --version
if command -v python3 >/dev/null; then printf 'python: '; python3 --version; else echo 'python: not installed'; fi
if command -v node >/dev/null; then printf 'node: '; node --version; else echo 'node: not installed'; fi
printf 'top-level files:\n'; ls -la | sed -n '1,40p'
command:
exec 2>&1
set -e
printf 'cwd: '; pwd
printf 'user: '; whoami
printf 'git: '; git --version
if command -v python3 >/dev/null; then printf 'python: '; python3 --version; else echo 'python: not installed'; fi
if command -v node >/dev/null; then printf 'node: '; node --version; else echo 'node: not installed'; fi
printf 'top-level files:\n'; ls -la | sed -n '1,40p'
